name: Layer5
label: Layer5
description: AI agent outcome tracking and scoring. Layer5 learns from every action your AI agent takes and recommends the best next action.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.label: API Key
parameters.help: Your Layer5 API key. Starts with 'layer5_'. Find it at app.layer5.dev/settings/api-keys

modules.name: getActionScores
modules.label: Get Action Scores
modules.description: Ask Layer5 which action your AI agent should take next. Returns a ranked list of actions with confidence scores.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.label: Agent Name
parameters.help: A unique name for your AI agent. Use the same name every time so Layer5 can learn from this agent's history. Example: customer-support-bot

parameters.name: issue_type
parameters.label: Issue Type
parameters.help: What kind of situation is this? Layer5 uses this to find the best actions for this problem type. Example: payment_failed

parameters.name: top_n
parameters.label: Max Results
parameters.help: How many action recommendations to return. Default is 10, maximum is 50.

errors.401: Your Layer5 API key is invalid. Check your connection settings. Keys start with 'layer5_'.
errors.429: You've hit the rate limit. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.400:MISSING_PARAM: Issue Type is required. Fill in what kind of problem this is.

modules.name: logActionOutcome
modules.label: Log Action Outcome
modules.description: Tell Layer5 what happened after your AI agent took an action. Layer5 learns from every outcome to give better recommendations next time.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.label: Agent Name
parameters.help: A unique name for your AI agent. Use the same name every time so Layer5 can learn from this agent's history. Example: customer-support-bot

parameters.name: action_name
parameters.label: Action Name
parameters.help: The name of the action your agent just took. This must be registered in your Layer5 dashboard. Example: send_refund

parameters.name: success
parameters.label: Did It Work?
parameters.help: Did the action work as expected? Toggle on for success, off for failure.

parameters.name: outcome_score
parameters.label: Outcome Score (Optional)
parameters.help: How well did the action actually work? 0.0 = completely failed, 0.5 = partially worked, 1.0 = worked perfectly. Leave empty to use the success toggle only.

parameters.name: response_ms
parameters.label: Response Time in ms (Optional)
parameters.help: How long did the action take in milliseconds? Layer5 uses this to detect when actions are getting slower. Example: 1200

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.label: Session ID (Optional)
parameters.help: A unique ID for this conversation or workflow run. Groups related actions together.

parameters.name: context
parameters.label: Context (JSON, Optional)
parameters.help: Extra information about the situation, as JSON. Example: {"issue_type": "payment_failed", "customer_tier": "enterprise"}. Layer5 uses this to give better recommendations.

errors.401: Your Layer5 API key is invalid. Check your connection settings.
errors.429: You've hit the rate limit. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.400:UNKNOWN_ACTION: This action is not registered in Layer5. Add it at app.layer5.dev/actions.
errors.400:ACTION_DISABLED: This action has been disabled. Re-enable it at app.layer5.dev/actions.
errors.400:MISSING_FIELD: Action Name is required. Fill in the name of the action your agent took.

modules.name: submitOutcomeFeedback
modules.label: Submit Outcome Feedback
modules.description: Update a previous outcome with a final score. Use this when you learn later how well an action really worked.

parameters.name: outcome_id
parameters.label: Outcome ID
parameters.help: The outcome ID returned when you logged the original action. You get this from the 'Log Action Outcome' step.

parameters.name: final_score
parameters.label: Final Score
parameters.help: How well did the action really work in the end? 0.0 = completely failed, 1.0 = worked perfectly.

parameters.name: business_outcome
parameters.label: Business Outcome
parameters.help: What was the final business result? Choose the option that best describes what happened.

parameters.name: feedback_notes
parameters.label: Notes (Optional)
parameters.help: Any extra notes about the outcome. Stored for your team's reference.

errors.401: Your Layer5 API key is invalid. Check your connection settings.
errors.404: Outcome not found. Check the Outcome ID — it comes from the 'Log Action Outcome' step.
errors.429: You've hit the rate limit. Wait a moment and try again.

modules.name: simulateSequence
modules.label: Simulate Action Sequence
modules.description: Predict the outcome of a proposed action sequence before execution. Layer5 uses historical data and ML models to estimate success probability and suggest better paths.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.label: Agent ID
parameters.help: Your Layer5 agent identifier. Found in your Layer5 dashboard.

parameters.name: context
parameters.label: Context (JSON)
parameters.help: The situation as JSON. Example: {"issue_type":"payment_failed"}

parameters.name: proposed_sequence
parameters.label: Proposed Actions (comma-separated)
parameters.help: Actions to evaluate, in order. Example: clear_cache,restart_service. Max 5.

parameters.name: episode_history
parameters.label: Already Tried (Optional)
parameters.help: Actions already attempted, comma-separated.

parameters.name: simulate_alternatives
parameters.label: Alternatives to Generate (Optional)
parameters.help: How many alternative sequences to suggest. 0–3.

errors.401: Your Layer5 API key is invalid. Check your connection settings.
errors.404: Agent not found. Check your Agent ID in the Layer5 dashboard.
errors.400: Invalid simulation request. Check that all required fields are filled in correctly.
errors.429: You've hit the rate limit. Wait a moment and try again.
